landing.hero.title: AI-Era GEO Intelligent Publishing Platform
landing.hero.subtitle: Built on CloudWeGo high-performance microservice architecture, helping enterprises enhance brand visibility in the AI search era. Supports multi-model content optimization, multi-channel intelligent distribution, and full-chain performance monitoring.
landing.features.title: Core Features
landing.features.subtitle: Full-chain GEO optimization solution
landing.features.aiOptimize.desc: Multi-model GEO semantic enhancement based on DeepSeek, Kimi, Doubao, improving AI search visibility
landing.features.multiChannel.desc: One-click publishing to WeChat, Weibo, Douyin, Xiaohongshu and other major platforms
landing.features.compliance.desc: Sensitive word filtering, advertising law compliance, AIGC labeling automation
landing.features.monitor.desc: AI citation tracking, source authority scoring, ROI attribution analysis

stagger.page.subtitle: Configure publishing intervals and random delays for matrix accounts to simulate real human operation rhythm
stagger.alert.title: Staggered Publishing Strategy
stagger.alert.description: Set publishing intervals and random delays between accounts to avoid triggering platform risk controls. Each account will publish with a random delay within the configured time window, simulating real human behavior.
stagger.feature.title: Staggered Publishing Feature
stagger.feature.description: When enabled, all batch publishing tasks will automatically apply staggered strategies
stagger.config.minIntervalTip: Minimum interval between consecutive publications for the same account
stagger.config.maxIntervalTip: Maximum interval between consecutive publications for the same account
stagger.config.randomRangeTip: Random fluctuation percentage on the base interval
stagger.config.batchSizeTip: Number of accounts to publish simultaneously per batch
stagger.config.cooldownAfterTip: Number of consecutive publications before triggering cooldown
stagger.strategy.name: Strategy Name
stagger.example.title: Publish Time Calculation Example
stagger.example.scenario: Scenario: 10 accounts publishing the same content
stagger.example.lowRisk: Low Risk - Matches real human operation rhythm
